paths.name: @apollo/client
paths.message: Phase B/C decoupling: Apollo client belongs in @lodestar/data-hasura. These packages must stay data-layer-agnostic.

paths.name: graphql
paths.message: Phase B/C decoupling: raw GraphQL types belong in @lodestar/data-hasura / @lodestar/graphql only.

paths.name: graphql-ws
paths.message: Phase B/C decoupling: websocket subscriptions belong in @lodestar/data-hasura only.

patterns.message: Phase B/C decoupling: @lodestar/graphql is an implementation detail of @lodestar/data-hasura. Import the concrete hook from @lodestar/data-hasura instead, or push the data concern up to the consumer app.
